5:
The <Emphasis>Dalriada</Emphasis> has been rendered inoperable, but it remains to be seen what armaments yet remain within. Even so, there may never come a finer opportunity for the Resistance to strike, and Bajsaljen intends to seize it. He asks that you accompany his troops into the warship, and at last put an end to the IVth Legion's schemes to control Bozja.

※Players may enter the Dalriada via the associated critical engagement.
